message:
chore(gitignore): Add ephemeral file patterns for agent workflows

Skip temporary/generated files that should not be committed:
- RESEARCH_FINDINGS.md, TOON_INTEGRATION_BRIEF.md (agent notes)
- cov_*.out (coverage outputs)
- rustc-ice-*.txt (compiler crash reports)
- *.snap.new (pending snapshot tests)
- sweep_*.png, test_screenshot.png (test artifacts)
- target-*/ (prefixed build directories)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -43,3 +43,14 @@ tests/testdata/benchmark/
 
 # E2E test logs
 test_results_e2e_*.log
+
+# Ephemeral/temporary files (agent workflow artifacts)
+RESEARCH_FINDINGS.md
+TOON_INTEGRATION_BRIEF.md
+cov_*.out
+rustc-ice-*.txt
+*.snap.new
+sweep_*.png
+test_screenshot.png
+a.out
+target-*/
